summary: Frontend-only testing of Paris Greeters public pages migration (iteration 9). All 9 public routes + redirect tested successfully. Gallery lightbox, guestbook navigation, and contact form submission all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Public shell (TopBar, Header, Footer) consistent across all pages
Interactive components (lightbox, carousel, form) work correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used fallback data from lib/public-pages-data.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 public pages tested: /qui-sommes-nous, /actualites, /galerie, /livre-dor, /faire-un-don, /devenez-benevole, /contact, /presse, /mentions-legales. Redirect /mention-legale → /mentions-legales validated. Gallery lightbox (open/close/prev/next), Guestbook carousel (prev/next/dots), Contact form submission (MOCKED API - shows success feedback) all working.

features_tested.public_routes_load: PASS - All 9 routes load correctly with header/footer shell
features_tested.gallery_lightbox: PASS - Opens, displays image, prev/next/close buttons work
features_tested.guestbook_navigation: PASS - Prev/next buttons and dot navigation work
features_tested.contact_form_submission: PASS - Form validates, submits, shows success feedback
features_tested.header_footer_consistency: PASS - PublicPageShell renders correctly on all pages

mocked_apis_list: /api/contact/send - Returns success message without sending actual email
